---

As a user
I want date-grouped visibility into claimed/open/posted/missed items so planning is clear.
So I can coordinate posting commitments effectively.

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Weekly and monthly views render if component support exists; fallback to date-grouped list.
- [ ] Campaign filter is available in calendar view.
- [ ] Open slots, claimed items, posted items, and missed items have distinct visual states.
- [ ] Clicking item opens content detail.
- [ ] View remains usable on mobile.
